info.title: Arventa WHS Monitor API
info.description: WHS Monitor is a modular, cloud-based Work Health and Safety compliance management software by Arventa. This API provides endpoints for managing workers, locations, departments, checklists, chemicals, incident reports, risk assessments, and more.

get.summary: Fetch assets by type with pagination
Retrieve audit logs with optional date filtering
Get a specific location by ID
Fetch risk assessment data by type

post.summary: Create a worker for a site
Assign user roles for a site
Assign worker divisions for a site
Create a worker for a specific site
Add a department to a worker

delete.summary: Remove a department from a worker

post.summary: Assign a location to a worker

delete.summary: Remove a location from a worker

put.summary: Assign a reporting manager to a worker

get.summary: Get roles for a specific worker

post.summary: Assign a role to a worker

get.summary: Get a specific role for a worker

post.summary: Assign a specific role to a worker

delete.summary: Remove a role from a worker
